title: Kenitra, Rabat-Salé-Kénitra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kenitra, Rabat-Salé-Kénitra: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kenitra is a city in Rabat-Salé-Kénitra with a population of 431,000. An industrial port city on the Sebou River, known for its growing manufacturing sector and proximity to Rabat.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
